race.comment: MAI ALOHA (8) won first-up and has been beaten narrowly her past couple, including over 1200m last time out. Back to the short course today for Pike with the blinkers going on for the first time. May need some luck early but her recent form shows she's in this up to her ears. DESERT DANCING (5) is third-up now and has been solid in defeat to begin this campaign. CJP now hops on board and some sting out of the ground is no issue. Form out of her last start has stood up and she can make her presence felt again. SNIPER'S SON (7) is looking for the hat-trick after a 1.3L defeat over this trip at Northam last time out. He's gone to another level his past couple and while this is tougher, it looks to set up similarly. Can go extend his winning streak. RIPPER FAROOQ (9) was good in his only trial coming into this and a forward showing is on the cards. SESH (10) was well backed when winning last time out and can go on with the job.
